news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Indxx Medical Devices ETF

holdings.infoBox: MDEV is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are West Pharmaceutical Services stock at 2.68%, LivaNova at 2.67%, Demant at 2.58%, Straumann Holding AG at 2.54%, and Baxter International at 2.41%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx Medical Devices ETF (MDEV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Global Medical Equipment index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index that gives global exposure to the medical equipment industry. MDEV was launched on Jun 22, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Indxx Medical Devices ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
